dismissalText.commentary: Ajinkya Rahane c & b Hazlewood 19 (13b 3x4 1x6 23m) SR: 146.15

dismissalComment.html: goes straight up, and Rahane's fun is over! Banged into the track just outside off. Rahane looks for the pull but is awfully late on the stroke. Pops up off the top edge and Hazlewood completes the most regulations of return catches. Hazlewood into the act early!

dismissalText.commentary: Finn Allen c †Sharma b Kumar 18 (8b 3x4 1x6 11m) SR: 225

dismissalComment.html: nicked and gone! Bhuvi has the last laugh, and Allen is outta here! Back of a length in the channel and this threatens to angle in before straightening off the pitch. Allen is squared up as he wafts at it and can only feather it through to the keeper. Big, big wicket for RCB, and the crowd finds its voice!

dismissalComment.html: run-out to finish the innings, and KKR end up on 192! Superb yorker on leg. Rinku cannot get under it and clinks it out to long on. Raghuvanshi chances his luck on the second but is well short, despite a dive. Top work by Padikkal from the deep, it must be said!

dismissalText.commentary: Cameron Green b Rasikh Salam 32 (24b 3x4 1x6 34m) SR: 133.33

dismissalComment.html: zing bails go flying, and Green is sent packing Pace-on, back of a length on off. Zips back in a touch and Green, having an ugly hoick across the line, gets done in by the pace. Misses it completely and the ball thunders into the stumps. RCB with a timely breakthrough!

dismissalText.commentary: Jacob Bethell c & b Kartik Tyagi 15 (12b 2x4 1x6 16m) SR: 125

dismissalComment.html: a snorter at almost 144kph, and Bethell has to depart! Shortish on middle and leg. Climbs through on Bethell and he gets cramped for room on the pull. Nowhere to go and the ball spoons up off the splice. Kisses the helmet before looping up definitively and the bowler does the rest. Bethell's chain also falls off, and RCB's opening partnership has been broken in the fourth over!

dismissalText.commentary: Tim David c Pandey b Kartik Tyagi 2 (3b 0x4 0x6 9m) SR: 66.66

dismissalComment.html: oh my days - what a sensational catch that is! An absolute worldie! Shortish just outside off. David backs away and flays it towards backward point. Pandey flies to his left, lunges down low and somehow makes it stick. The crowd is shocked. The bowler cannot believe it either. Not sure anyone watching can believe it either. The ball was almost behind Pandey as he flung out his left mitt, and he grasped it beautifully. There is a check on to see if the catch is fair. Third umpire says the catch is clean, and this might go down as one of the greatest IPL catches of all time!

dismissalText.commentary: Tim David c Pandey b Kartik Tyagi 2 (3b 0x4 0x6 9m) SR: 66.66

dismissalComment.html: oh my days - what a sensational catch that is! An absolute worldie! Shortish just outside off. David backs away and flays it towards backward point. Pandey flies to his left, lunges down low and somehow makes it stick. The crowd is shocked. The bowler cannot believe it either. Not sure anyone watching can believe it either. The ball was almost behind Pandey as he flung out his left mitt, and he grasped it beautifully. There is a check on to see if the catch is fair. Third umpire says the catch is clean, and this might go down as one of the greatest IPL catches of all time!
